model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. It accurately produces the target text and successfully modifies the voice to have a low pitch as requested. Model 2 fails to produce the correct text (severe hallucinations/mispronunciations) and fails to apply the requested paralinguistic feature, producing a high-pitched, glitchy audio instead.
